name: zheng2022_microbe_seq
notes: Paper methods say raw R1 starts with 45 bp droplet barcode; I1 is 8 bp sample index; R2 is microbial sequence. For 300 bp runs, R1 is barcode + adapter + microbial tail. SRA Toolkit output for SRR17944416 appears processed/clipped and does not visibly expose the 45 bp droplet barcode in _1.fastq.
